content.en:
Bang!!!!

This creature was about the same strength as that Eighth Bone Transformation Realm primitive-level genius.

Abrupt.

The Eighth Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Genius shattered the shell of this creature's body, and the pieces of Source Stones on the other side fell off.

Then.

The creature's true form was revealed, and it was a creature that looked a little bulging.

Then, this eighth-time bone transformation realm primeval-level genius snatched these other source stones and ran away, without pestering this creature too much.

However.

Ye Tian stared at the creature and fell into deep thought.

"Could this creature be the legendary Origin Beast of the Other Side?"

Ye Tian had seen a record of the source beast on the other side in the inheritance of the ancient Heng Mountain.

The source beasts are creatures born in the source stone veins on the other side, they like to lie in the source stone veins on the other side, and like to adsorb various special materials on the surface of the body, refining these shells day and night, using them as one of their means of defense.

As a result, some of the other side source beasts will even attach the other side source stone to the surface of their bodies, so they are easy to recognize.

"The source beast on the other side was born in the source stone vein on the other side, will it be easy to find the source stone on the other side?"

Ye Tian guessed.

The possibility exists.

However, it is very difficult to track down the source beast on the other side.

I saw that the speed of this source beast on the other side was too fast, and it would have a special escape method, and it seemed that it could use the power of the origin rules of the other side to directly escape into the unknown void, and thus disappear.

Ye Tian tried to track it up, but found that he couldn't catch up at all.

"Forget it, if you can't track it, you can't track it. However, the cultivation of this other side source beast is too high, and I can't replicate its body. If you can find a source beast with a very weak cultivation, then you can copy the other party's body, and maybe you can find a lot of source stones on the other side!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The years that followed.

Not only did he look for the source beast on the other side in the Ancient God Domain on the other side, but he also inquired about the news in the outside world.

this day.

He finally found out about the source beast on the other side.

And this news came from the Eternal Night Pavilion.

There was an auction in the Eternal Night Pavilion branch of the Nine Demon Domain, among which there was a weak Origin Beast from the other side that was auctioned, and its cultivation was about five times the Bone Transformation Realm.

After Ye Tian got the news, he went to the Nine Demons Domain.

......

The domain of the Nine Demons, the capital of the Blood Demons.

Ye Tian came here, and then got an auction spot and entered this auction.

At this auction, Ye Tian was also waiting slowly.

Finally, he waited for the auction of the source beast on the other side.

Rumble!

A living Origin Beast from the other side was sent to the auction table, and many bone transformation realms could sense the breath of this Origin Beast from the other side.

"Saw it, can be copied!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Then.

Many of the Bone Transformation Realms were very interested in this Origin Beast from the other side.

However, the source beast on the other side has no wisdom and is unruly, so it is difficult to control.

Therefore, these Bone Transformation Realms did not expect to use the Origin Beasts of the Other Shore to find the Origin Beasts of the Other Shore, they had other purposes.

Because the other side source beast has a trace of the other side origin rule in its body, they can extract that trace of the other side origin rule in the other side source beast's body, and then comprehend its other side origin rule.

At that time, even if you can't comprehend the Origin Rules of the other side, there is a glimmer of hope that you will comprehend the ordinary Origin Rules!

Many Heavenly Ancestors who were trapped in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm dreamed of comprehending the Origin Rules, so the Origin Beasts on the other side were of great value to them.

The competition for this source beast on the other side was very fierce, and one after another Nine Bone Transformation Realm primeval level geniuses fought for it, and it cost a lot of money.

And Ye Tian didn't get involved, he didn't want to waste the Eternal Ancient Gold to compete for this Origin Beast on the other side.

He didn't even wait for the auction to end and left the place.

......

The Ancient Gods of the Other Side.

Ye Tian began to copy the body of the source beast on the other side.

Time passed little by little, and after a long time, a copy of the source beast from the other side was revealed.

"If you can find a large number of source stones on the other side, it depends on the copy of this source beast on the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He used this other shore source beast to copy his body and move, looking for the other side source stone.

"I didn't sense the source stone on the other side, it should be a matter of distance, maybe you can sense the existence of the source stone on the other side by approaching the source stone on the other side!"

Thereupon.

His other shore source beast copy body shuttled quickly, and his real body copy body was also following, in case he encountered other bone transformation realms, if he was interested in his other shore source beast copy body, he would definitely intercept it.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's other side source beast copied his body and sensed the attraction of an item.

So, he quickly shuttled over.

"Hey, a source stone from the other side!!"

Ye Tian was excited.

This is enough to prove that the source beast on the other side can really find the source stone on the other side!

Now, he can find a large number of source stones in the Ancient God Domain on the other side.

In the long years that followed, he searched for the source stone on the other side of the ancient god realm.

One after another, he found the source stones on the other side.

this day.

A large number of attractions came, indicating that he was about to find a lot of source stones from the other side.

"Could it be a source stone vein on the other side, but it should not be a large ore vein, through induction, the number of these source stones on the other side is only thousands. "

He quickly shuttled through.

In the depths of a ruin, more than 1,300 source stones from the other side were excavated.

Then, he gave these other source stones to the real body to copy the body.

After a long time, he had almost found the source stones of the Ancient God Domain on the other side, but the number was not as many as he imagined.

"Only more than 60,000 source stones from the other side?"

Ye Tian felt that the Ancient God Domain on the other side was also a place where it was easy to give birth to the source stones on the other side, how could it be that there were hundreds of thousands of source stones on the other side, but now it seems that there are so many!

That's a bit of a small number.

Thereupon.

He was ready to leave.

As for the copy body of the source beast on the other side, he directly annihilated it.

......

The exit of the Ancient God's Domain on the other side.

Ye Tian came out of here, and then left quickly.

And just after Ye Tian left the Ancient God Realm on the other side for a few primeval eras, there were almost no bone transformation realms to find the source stones on the other side inside, and after the bone transformation realm came out of it, they complained, and even publicized it.

As a result, there are fewer and fewer bone transformation realms who are willing to come to the Ancient God Domain on the other side to find the source stone on the other side.

The high-ranking members of the Ancient God Sect held a meeting on this.

"What's going on, it's not been long since the last time I put some source stones on the other side, and I can't find the source stones on the other side so quickly?"

"Send another batch of source stones from the other side into the Ancient God Domain of the other side, and then publicize it, the Ancient God Domain of the other side is a major business industry, and it cannot be abandoned. "

"Yes, I'll arrange it!"

If Ye Tian knew that many of the source stones of the Ancient God Domain on the other side were deliberately sent in by the Ancient God Sect, he would definitely be confused!

Because many forces, even the Lord of Eternal Zero, think that the source stone on the other side of there was bred!
